svg.text: DATA FLOW: Session → Extract → Persist → Sync → Compact

text.style: font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; fill: #66d9ff;

svg.text: • Memdir ↔ Team Sync: Delta push on extraction
• autoDream ↔ Memdir: Write consolidated insights back
• Context Compaction ↔ Memdir: Inject selected memories (!mem prefix)
Level 2 (Persistent Local): Memdir → autoDream consolidation → MEMORY.md
Level 3 (Persistent Remote): Team Memory Sync (SHA256 delta, 44 gitleaks rules)
